hero.title: Learning with Values, Discipline, and Excellence
hero.subtitle: A nurturing environment where every child is inspired to dream big, learn deeply, and grow confidently.
hero.imageAlt: Students learning at Bright Future School

aboutPreview.title: A School Built on Values and Vision
aboutPreview.description: Bright Future School has been nurturing young minds since 2005. We believe every child has unique potential waiting to be discovered. Our school provides a balanced academic environment that fosters intellectual growth, character building, and personal development.

whyChooseUs.title: What Makes Bright Future School Different

items.title: Modern Infrastructure
items.description: Smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a spacious campus designed for 21st-century learning.

items.title: Experienced Faculty
items.description: Dedicated and qualified teachers who care about every student's growth and wellbeing.

items.title: Strong Academics
items.description: A rigorous yet balanced curriculum that prepares students for higher education and life.

items.title: Value-Based Education
items.description: Character, discipline, and moral values are woven into everything we do at our school.

items.title: Co-curricular Activities
items.description: Sports, arts, music, and clubs that develop well-rounded individuals beyond the classroom.

items.title: Safe & Secure Campus
items.description: CCTV surveillance, trained staff, and a safe environment parents can truly trust.

academicsPreview.title: Programs for Every Stage of Learning
academicsPreview.description: From Pre-Primary to High School, we offer structured programmes that grow with your child at every stage.

programs.title: Pre-Primary
programs.description: Play-based learning to build curiosity, confidence, and a love for school.

programs.title: Primary
programs.description: Strong foundation in literacy, numeracy, science, and values.

programs.title: Middle School
programs.description: Expanding knowledge with critical thinking, research skills, and creativity.

programs.title: High School
programs.description: Rigorous board exam preparation and career readiness guidance.

facilitiesPreview.title: A Campus Built for Learning and Growth
facilitiesPreview.description: Our facilities support every aspect of student development — academic, physical, and creative.

admissionsCTA.title: Secure Your Child's Future Today
admissionsCTA.description: Admissions for the academic year 2026–27 are now open. Limited seats available per class. Apply early to avoid disappointment.

noticesPreview.title: Stay Informed
noticesPreview.description: Important announcements and updates from Bright Future School.

items.title: Admissions Open for Academic Year 2026–27
items.excerpt: Admissions for 2026–27 are now open. Limited seats available across all sections. Apply early.

items.title: Mid-Term Examination Schedule – Term 2
items.excerpt: Mid-Term Examinations for Term 2 are scheduled from 20th to 28th September 2026. Hall tickets to follow.

items.title: Holiday Notice – Summer Vacation 2026
items.excerpt: School will remain closed from 1st May to 31st May 2026. Classes resume 2nd June 2026.

galleryPreview.title: Life at Bright Future School
galleryPreview.description: Glimpses of learning, laughter, and achievement at our campus.

contactCTA.title: We'd Love to Hear From You
contactCTA.description: Have questions about admissions, fees, or school programmes? Our team is happy to help you.
